page: Microsoft Azure HB120rs_v3 is a high-performance compute instance belonging to the HBv3 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 120 dedicated virtual CPUs powered by an Intel processor. The system is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring dedicated resource allocation without virtualization overhead.

This server configuration includes 456.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.8 GB of RAM per core. For local data storage, the instance is equipped with 2412 GB of local storage. It is also Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external storage volumes, and supports Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) for low-latency, high-throughput inter-node communication.

Given its high core count and RDMA capabilities, the HB120rs_v3 offers strong resource density for parallel computing tasks. The qualitative cost efficiency is optimized for large-scale deployments where multi-node clustering and high-speed interconnects reduce overall execution time. This instance is designed for compute-intensive workloads, including high-performance computing, large-scale simulations, computational fluid dynamics, and complex engineering analyses.
description: Microsoft Azure HB120rs_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server within the HBv3 family, designed for high-performance computing workloads. It features 120 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 456.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.8 GB of RAM per core, alongside 2412 GB of local storage. It supports RDMA networking and is Premium Storage capable, making it highly suitable for clustered, multi-node deployments. This hardware profile is optimized for compute-heavy tasks, such as scientific simulations, engineering analysis, and large-scale parallel processing workloads, offering high resource density and efficient inter-node communication without the inclusion of dedicated GPU hardware.
og_description: Microsoft Azure HB120rs_v3 is a high-performance compute server featuring 120 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 456 GB of RAM, 2412 GB of local storage, and RDMA capabilities for parallel workloads.
